title: kaempferia malaccana
intro: Kaempferia malaccana, also known as Malaccan galangal or Thai ginger, is a type of plant belonging to the Zingiberaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, derived from its rhizome. The health benefits of Kaempferia malaccana include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the rhizome of Kaempferia malaccana is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
